macro_note: US-Israel struck Iran Feb 28. Hormuz closed. Brent crude $104–$122/bbl. FIIs sold ₹1.04L cr CY2026.

signals.title: MRPL: Crude Input Cost Explosion
signals.summary: Brent at $104–$122/bbl. MRPL is a PSU refiner — input costs up 50–75%. Government blocked cost pass-through via ₹10/L excise cut. Q4 GRM will collapse.
signals.action: Do NOT add. Stop loss: ₹160. Check Q4 earnings ~May 2026.
signals.source: Brent crude CNN/CNBC Mar 27; MRPL LTP ₹181.65

signals.title: SWIGGY: 3.2% Above 52-Week Low — Breach Risk
signals.summary: SWIGGY at ₹268.55. 52-wk low ₹266.30. Down 37% in 6 months. Quick-commerce war ongoing. 382 shares across both portfolios.
signals.action: Define stop-loss NOW. Exit ICICI position if close below ₹260.

signals.title: INDIGO: ATF Cost Spike from Crude Surge
signals.summary: ATF = 35–40% of IndiGo's costs. Crude up 50–75% from $70 to $104–$122. Q4 FY26 margin will take severe hit.
signals.action: Hold but do not add. Consider partial exit above ₹4,350.
signals.source: Brent crude CNBC Mar 27; INDIGO LTP ₹4,294

signals.title: FII Outflow + PMI Weakness → Nifty Downside
signals.summary: FIIs net -₹1.04L cr CY2026. India PMI at lowest since Oct 2022. Nifty fell 2.09% on March 27. Next support: 22,000–22,200.
signals.action: Avoid averaging into PSU/infra positions. Keep powder dry.
signals.source: Business Standard FII data; HSBC PMI flash Mar 2026

signals.title: ASTRA MICRO +83%: Book Partial Profits
signals.summary: At ~₹1,030 vs avg ₹562.35 — +83% gain on 20 shares. Defence sector at stretched 50x PE (vs 10-yr avg 36.6x).
signals.action: Sell 10 of 20 shares. Hold remaining 10 with stop loss ₹850.
signals.source: Defence sector PE: Business Standard Dec 2025; ASTRA MICRO LTP

signals.title: PSU Infra Cluster: No Near-Term Catalyst
signals.summary: IRFC -30.8%, IREDA -34.4%, IRCON -28.7%, NHPC -26.3%. Oil shock worsens India's fiscal position → capex delays. No recovery catalyst until crude normalises.
signals.action: DO NOT AVERAGE. Hold 3–6 month horizon. Recovery trigger: Iran ceasefire → fiscal relief → capex.
signals.source: India fiscal analysis: CNBC Mar 27; stock LTPs

signals.title: COAL INDIA +34%: Consider Partial Profit Booking
signals.summary: At ₹462.25 vs avg ₹345.55 (+33.8%). Crude-coal substitution effect is real. JM Financial has Coal India in buy basket.
signals.action: Sell 25–30 of 55 shares. Lock in ~₹3,000 profit.

signals.title: ⚠️ ZERO IT SECTOR EXPOSURE
signals.summary: Portfolio has no IT stocks. With INR under depreciation pressure (crude import bill), IT (USD-earners) is a natural hedge. IT described as 'cheap' by analysts vs PSU/infra.
signals.action: Plan Nifty IT ETF entry when Nifty finds support at ~22,000.

signals.title: SBI Gold Fund: Verify SETFGOLD vs Gold ATH
signals.summary: Gold at $5,300/oz all-time high. SBI Gold Fund SIP (₹15K/mo) should be performing strongly. SETFGOLD shows ₹121 — verify on broker portal as this may lag gold ATH.
signals.action: Verify SETFGOLD price on ICICI Direct. Continue SBI Gold Fund SIP.

signals.title: ADANI PORT: Hormuz Closure → Trade Volume Risk
signals.summary: Mundra port exposed to India-Middle East trade disruption. Hormuz closed since Mar 4 → ships rerouting via Cape of Good Hope. At -12.9% vs avg ₹1,579.
signals.action: Hold. Stop loss ₹1,250. Key catalyst: Hormuz reopening.
signals.source: Wikipedia: Economic impact of 2026 Iran war

signals.title: HDFC Defence Fund: Hold, Valuations Stretched
signals.summary: NAV ₹23.657, +21% 1-yr, +22% on ₹3.14L investment. Nifty Defence at 50.6x PE vs 10-yr avg 36.6x. Iran war = defence tailwind, but expensive.
signals.action: Hold. Proceed April 18 SIP. No lump-sum additions. Book partial if NAV > ₹27.
signals.source: Groww NAV data; Business Standard PE data

signals.title: TATA MOTORS DVR: Structural Discount — Avoid Adding
signals.summary: DVR at ~-51% vs avg ₹622.74. DVR structurally trades 40–50% below regular shares. Regular Tata Motors at +51.8% — only DVR is the problem.
signals.action: Exit on any bounce above ₹350. File capital loss for tax offset. No averaging.

opportunities.title: Nifty IT ETF — Fill the IT Gap
opportunities.reasoning: Zero IT exposure when FII selling is concentrated in PSU/infra. IT stocks (TCS, Infosys) earn USD — benefits from INR depreciation. Nifty IT described as 'cheap' by analysts at current valuations vs historical averages.
opportunities.risk: US recession tanks IT spending; USD weakens

opportunities.title: ACME SOLAR + NHPC BESS Partnership
opportunities.reasoning: ACME Solar and NHPC signed a landmark 275 MW/550 MWh Battery Energy Storage deal for Andhra Pradesh (Feb 2026). Long-term revenue stream for both. Currently both at significant losses — but fundamental positioning is strong.
opportunities.entry_condition: Already held. Wait for government capex restoration as trigger.
opportunities.risk: Project delays; fiscal constraints delay commissioning

opportunities.title: CMA CGM 6-Vessel Order (COCHINSHIP)
opportunities.reasoning: Cochin Shipyard signed deal (Feb 18, 2026) to build 6 × 1,700 TEU LNG feeder vessels for CMA CGM. Deliveries 36–64 months. Adds to order book beyond domestic defence contracts.
opportunities.entry_condition: Already held. Watch for management guidance on margin from this contract.
opportunities.risk: Shipping cycle reversal; LNG demand drops
